item.title: Crazy comes in all shapes, sizes, and genders!
item.description: Watching the Heard/Depp trial has been an unhappy trip down memory lane. Way back in 2007/2008 I used to Dungeon Master a D&D campaign for a bunch of people I went to the goth bars with. It was a mixed group of men and women. I ended up dating one of the girls but it ended up ending pretty badly after just a few months. We had been drinking, and had a fairly minor disagreement one night. I left to go chill out in my bedroom to de-escalate. I was in my late 20s, didn't have a lot of money, so my bed was a mattress and a boxer on the floor. She followed in after me, kicked me in the back, called me a "pussy" and said she had my wallet. She was threatening to throw it out the window of my apartment 23 floors up. I was pretty shocked and upset I'd just been assaulted, plus I didn't live in a great neighborhood so the thought of my wallet flying out into the night was upsetting. I got up, insisted she give it back, and when I got too close she pulled a battle axe off the wall and started threatening me with it (remember I said I was a D&D nerd right? My apartment was decorated with medieval weapons). I'm a big guy but I legit felt threatened, so I leaped forward and grabbed the axe, because shit - she'd already kicked me - what else was she capable of? I'd rather not end the evening getting hit with an axe. We struggled, and in the course of struggling the haft of the axe hit her in the face. She ended up with a black eye that lasted for a week and a half. I didn't mean to hurt her, but I was angry and scared, and no way was I going to let somebody pull my own axe on me in my own apartment! So in the end I disarmed her, she dropped the wallet, and then she called some middle aged sugar daddy I hadn't known about previously to come get her. He ended up coming into my apartment to give me hell too. Long story long I ended up loosing all of those friends, and others, because "I gave my girlfriend a black eye". Not one of those people ever bothered reaching out to get my side of the story. I have no doubt she played the entitled victim and ran my name through the mud. I learned about fair weather friends that day. And I also learned that crazy comes in all sizes, shapes, and genders. So when I hear Johnny's testimony about Amber chasing after him, room after room, escalating and forcing conflict I believe him.
item.dc:creator: bluegoatrampant

item.title: Small dump of stolen memes that make me laugh
item.description:
Sluuuurp
Been there, done that.
Me. Everytime.
I sufferd this pun, now you must too
Gertting married in August
Met a wonderful woman
We talked and talked
And before we realised, we didn't want to be appart
She can't cook though
But it's alright, cause we look out for each other
(Poorly timed meme LOL)
There's something quite reassuring knowing someone's got your back
That goes for friendships too
Anyways, i hope you had a good time with these memes
Don't forget to drink your water
Maybe wipe if you're on the bagel throne
Dog tax. This is Boomer, a certified good boy.
Isn't he just adorable Edit: whoa most viral! Thank you for all the well wishes! I'll also make sure to tell Boomer all of your nice comments :)
item.dc:creator: ThreeMoneyAndNoKids

item.title: .idek
item.description: I’m going to hell for this. A few years ago I started dating this amazing woman. She had a kid, 10 years old, and we seemed to get along pretty well. After about 7/8 months, his mom moves in with me. He stays with his dad during the week for private school, so it didn’t seem like a big deal. That’s about the time the kid started getting “bratty” with me. Tbh, I don’t know what to call it. He would have this cute Disney club kid demeanour when his mom was in the room, we’d all be laughing together, and she’d leave for something… this kid would snap on me and say stuff like “don’t fucking look at me”. After this kind of thing happening more than a handful of times, I told his mom I wasn’t ok with that behavior in our home and asked her to have a talk with him. The kid denied everything, cried and said he didn’t know why I was trying to get him in trouble. I’m in love with his mom. I’ve never felt this way over another person. And, I just tried shrugging it off as a kid adjusting to getting a step parent and freaking out. Still, I got some small security cameras off Amazon. Having a kid gaslight me was kind of weird, so it was a just in case measure. When he was 11, he was taking pictures of me and my room and sending them to his dad and his dads mom. I asked him to stop. He wrote me a letter, to tell me he hoped I die of type 1 diabetes and he wished the brain tumor I had would have killed me. He wrote that everything his dad says about me is true and I’m just a “rotating guy” in his mom’s bed. He even wrote that his dad said his mom didn’t love him as her son because she didn’t want to be the third wheel with bio dad and his new gf (yes, her ex wanted her to still play wifey while he had a new gf, that was her last straw and why she started dating) A good mom cares about the dad’s happiness is what he told the kid. I told the kid that the letter was really mean and we would have to talk about it when his mom came home. So… he called his dad to say I beat him. I pulled out the security footage of our interaction and suddenly the dad says we can’t see the kid anymore because we’re “too strict”. A surprise to me since I’ve never set nor enforced a bedtime, rule or any kind of restriction outside of asking for personal respect. He didn’t come over for 6 months. And then we all were supposed to pretend it never happened. He continues to be a little shit, and I watch my partner slowly give up on trying to correct behaviour. Instead she says she’s at her limit and all she can do is be a different role model than bio dad. GF becomes wife. We have a baby. Some months go by, and he gets diagnosed with cancer. Very treatable, very survivable. He’s still a little asshole. Mean. Even cold to his own baby sister. I don’t wish anything bad on this kid or anything. I just can’t fucking stand him, and he’s so mean. Not just to me, but even his mom. She worked so hard for so long to provide for him. His dad has mostly been out of work. Even I paid into child support so she could work less hours. 80 consistently is hard. I know I’m supposed to feel bad for the kid. And I love my partner. Swear to god or whatever that I hate seeing her worried and upset about her son. At the same time, I feel like karma took a huge shit on this kid for a reason and every setback and side effect that he endures, I can’t stop the little snotty voice in my head from saying “that’s what you get fucker” TL;DR— don’t. Tossing this into the void. (I hate my step son with cancer, and that makes me a monster I guess)
item.dc:creator: throwawayacct12345678
